qualitative_description: DSI vs diameter slope is not distinguishable from zero (slope=0.0049 per log2(multiplier), p=0.01948, dsi_range_extremes=0.0060); neither Schachter2010 nor passive filtering is supported. [PARTIAL: Null-Hz pre-condition FAILED: mean null firing at 1.0x baseline = 0.0000 Hz, below threshold 0.1 Hz. DSI slope interpretation is PARTIAL: primary DSI is still effectively pinned at the null-zero corner. Recommend a further reduction of GABA_CONDUCTANCE_NULL_NS (currently 6.0 nS), e.g. to 4 nS.]
